heroHeadline: From Athelstan to Starmer: 1,099 Years of British History
heroSubtitle: The United Kingdom navigates the post-Brexit era under Keir Starmer's Labour government, managing a £22bn fiscal inheritance, NHS crisis, Scottish independence pressure, and Charles III's new reign.
footerNote: Data sourced from UK Parliament Hansard, The National Archives, ONS, Bank of England, Electoral Commission, BBC, Reuters, FT, The Guardian, and major academic institutions including LSE, Chatham House, and the Resolution Foundation.
